title: Wallet seed encrypted storage
description: Encrypt the ZIP-32 master key (not the mnemonic) using argon2id KDF + XChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD, same scheme as identity.key passphrase. Store at data_dir/wallet.key. Key is separate file from identity.key. Passphrase prompted at startup, cached in memory only for session duration.
close_reason: wallet.key encrypted with age (64 bytes spending_key||chain_code); paranoid write-verify in wallet_init and wallet_restore
